title: Prepared statement rel_bin.c:2378: rel2bin_project: Assertion `0' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (x INTEGER, y VARCHAR(50), z DATE);
INSERT INTO bar (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 'test', DATE('2023-01-01'));
INSERT INTO bar (x, y, z) VALUES (2, NULL, NULL);
SELECT COUNT(y) FROM (SELECT x, y FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS x, NULL AS y FROM bar) AS t;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT x FROM bar WHERE y IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS x FROM bar) AS t;
key_bug_features: Using UNION ALL with NULL values in subquery
